Read `AGENTS.md` and `docs/AGENT_HANDOFF.md` before editing. Never weaken factory provenance, code-hash verification, exact approvals, self-recipient enforcement, oracle freshness, delayed administration, emergency exits, CSP/CORS, or public operations isolation. Never add secrets or claim an audit/approval that does not exist. Run `npm run verify` and the affected isolated EVM scenarios before proposing a merge.
